mapper.select: SELECT user_id, SUM(overtime_hours) AS total_overtime_hours FROM attendance_records WHERE attendance_date >= #{startDate} AND attendance_date <= #{endDate} AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY user_id HAVING SUM(overtime_hours) >= #{limitHours}

SELECT user_id, grant_date, used_days FROM paid_leave_balance WHERE expiry_date >= #{currentDate} AND #{currentDate} >= (grant_date + interval '1 month' * #{monthsPassed}) AND used_days < #{daysLimit}
